sourceData.name: SurgeRelay-macOS
sourceData.description: A macOS Surge module organization/editing/summary app, using Script Hub (https://github.com/Script-Hub-Org) as the upstream.

bodyHtml:
SurgeRelay-macOS is making waves in the Mobile ecosystem this week, gaining 12new stars. With a total of 96 stars on GitHub and 4 forks, this open-source project is rapidly becoming a go-to tool for developers worldwide.

⭐ 96Stars
📈 +12/wkGrowth
🔀 4Forks
⚠️ 3Open Issues

Key Features

  • Written in Swift for maximum performance
  • Licensed under Apache-2.0 — free to use and modify

Why SurgeRelay-macOS Is Trending

The Mobile landscape is constantly evolving, and SurgeRelay-macOS has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 12 new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: A macOS Surge module organization/editing/summary app, using Script Hub (https://github.com/Script-Hub-Org) as the upstream.

If you're working in Mobile, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Quick Start

Get started with SurgeRelay-macOS in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://github.com/EEliberto/SurgeRelay-macOS # Navigate to project cd SurgeRelay-macOS # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

SurgeRelay-macOS is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
